name: io.github.geter-andru/andru-intelligence
title: Andru Revenue Intelligence
description: Buyer intelligence for technical founders who sell to enterprises — know who to target, what to say, and when to walk away. 19 tools + CLI: ICP scoring, persona simulation, battlecards, deal classification, prospect discovery, sales hiring, investor matching, founder wellness.
